architecture.value: arm64 (aarch64) per design.md; also supports x86_64 per conanfile.py
architecture.source: design.md - 第1节; conanfile.py - 第59行

build_commands.value: rm -rf builddir; meson setup builddir; meson compile -C builddir

ut_commands.value: meson install -C builddir; meson test -C builddir

sample_commands.value: No standalone sample programs. devmon is a system daemon requiring dbus. README mentions busctl commands for device addition.

execution_log.note: Docker Hub not accessible; used Huawei Cloud mirror

execution_log.command: apt-get install -y gcc g++ make ninja-build pkg-config libdbus-1-dev libglib2.0-dev libboost-all-dev libgtest-dev meson python3 git cmake
cd /usr/src/gtest && cmake .. && make -j4 && install libs to /usr/local/lib
execution_log.output: gtest compiled and libraries copied to /usr/local/lib/
execution_log.note: libgtest-dev on Ubuntu only provides source; manual compilation required

execution_log.command: Modified subprojects/*.wrap files to use HTTPS instead of SSH URLs
execution_log.note: SSH URLs require keys not available in container

execution_log.output: Subprojects cloned (libmcpp, component_drivers). Build targets: 186. Found ninja-1.11.1
All libraries, headers, and config files installed
1/1 devmon_tests OK (1.40s). 1125 tests from 15 test suites all passed.

execution_log.command: docker stop verification-env && docker rm verification-env

process_timeline.action: Read documentation and extract build info
Pull Ubuntu 24.04 image and start container
Compile and install gtest from source + create pkg-config
Fix subproject wrap file URLs (SSH -> HTTPS)

artifacts.name: devmon_test
artifacts.type: ELF 64-bit LSB pie executable, x86-64 (with debug info)

artifacts.name: Driver libraries (180+)
artifacts.type: shared libraries (PSU, I2C, NVMe, FAN, NIC, etc.)

sample.note: No standalone sample programs. devmon is a system daemon that requires a running dbus session to function. The README mentions using busctl commands for device addition, which requires a full BMC runtime environment.

documentation_gaps: README.md project structure section is empty (no content under '## 项目结构')
Build commands in README reference 'cmake >= 3.10' in system requirements but the project uses Meson, not CMake
No version requirements specified for dbus and glib dependencies
Subproject wrap files use SSH git URLs (git@gitcode.com) without documentation that HTTPS alternatives are needed for headless/CI environments
No documentation on gtest installation steps beyond 'apt-get install libgtest-dev' (Ubuntu requires manual compilation from source)
No sample/example program documentation - only dbus-based runtime interaction examples
design.md is incomplete - cuts off mid-discussion at the end

problems_encountered.problem: Docker Hub not accessible - timeout pulling ubuntu:24.04
Subproject wrap files use SSH URLs (git@gitcode.com) requiring SSH authentication
problems_encountered.solution: Manually converted wrap files to use HTTPS URLs (https://gitcode.com/openUBMC/libmcpp.git and https://gitcode.com/openUBMC/component_drivers.git)

problems_encountered.problem: libgtest-dev on Ubuntu only provides source code, not compiled libraries
problems_encountered.solution: Manually compiled gtest using cmake in /usr/src/gtest and installed libraries to /usr/local/lib/; created pkg-config file for meson discovery

problems_encountered.problem: BUILD_TYPE_DT macro redefinition warning during compilation
problems_encountered.solution: Non-fatal warning: BUILD_TYPE_DT defined differently in src/utils.h (value 3) vs subprojects/libmcpp/include/mc/dbus/match.h (value 0x0a). Does not affect build success.
Non-fatal warning. Flag is Meson-specific or intended for Clang. Does not affect build.
